aboutHoldingDesc: A technology group of companies building digital infrastructure for the public and commercial sectors of Uzbekistan. Our mission is to make services fast, transparent, and accessible.
careerDesc: We build digital infrastructure that transforms public services and processes in Uzbekistan. Join a team working on national-scale projects.
digitalTransformation2: Digital transformation of public and commercial services in Uzbekistan
createDigitalFutureDesc: that makes public and commercial services fast, transparent, and accessible
digitalizationOfPublicServicesDesc: Comprehensive solutions for the digital transformation of government institutions
intelligentSystemsAndAnalyticsDesc: AI solutions and intelligent data processing for public and commercial sectors
digitalInfrastructureDesc: Design and implementation of large-scale technological infrastructure
contactUsToDiscuss: Contact us to discuss joint projects and digital solutions
contactYouShortly: Fill out the form and we will contact you shortly
name: Name
weBelieve: We believe technology should serve people. Every project we build aims to make interactions between citizens and the state simpler, faster, and more convenient.
clickToYear: Click on a year to learn more
managementDesc: Will be completed after receiving information — structure is provided below
foundingCompanyDesc: Start of operations in digital solutions for the public sector of Uzbekistan
foundingCompanyDetail: The company was founded on June 27, 2022. Its main focus was the development of digital solutions to automate public services and simplify interactions between citizens and government institutions.
firstProjectDesc: Launch of the first large-scale digitalization projects for public services
firstProjectDetail: An online application system was developed for the Ministry of Internal Affairs and traffic police, allowing citizens to submit requests and documents electronically without visiting offices.
expensionDirectionsDesc: Development of intelligent systems and analytics platforms
expensionDirectionsDetail: The company actively expanded into new digital services, including SafeRoad and platforms for online applications and driver services.
governmentPrivatePartnershipDesc: Formation of strategic partnerships with leading government institutions
governmentPrivatePartnershipDetail: A public-private partnership agreement was signed with the Ministry of Internal Affairs to implement digital solutions and modern services for citizens.
formationHoldingDesc: Consolidation of projects and companies into a unified holding structure
formationHoldingDetail: Based on completed projects and accumulated experience, a technology holding structure was formed объединяющая companies and projects in digital services, intelligent systems, and infrastructure solutions.
infrastructureDevelopmentDesc: Advancing digital transformation with AI technologies
infrastructureDevelopmentDetail: The holding entered a new phase by integrating advanced AI technologies into key projects. The portfolio exceeded 50+ solutions for public and commercial sectors.
nationalScaleProjectsDesc: We build technologies used by public services and millions of users.
strongTeamDesc: Our team includes IT specialists, analysts, project managers, and digital service experts.
growthAndDevelopmentDesc: Employees participate in complex technological projects and gain unique experience.
modernWorkEnvironmentDesc: Flexible processes, advanced technologies, and a culture of professional growth.
teamDesc: We bring together engineers, analysts, architects, and digital service specialists working on national-level projects.
becomePartDesc: If you are interested in working on technology projects that transform the country's digital infrastructure — join us
dragFile: Drag and drop a file or click to upload
portfolioDesc: Strategic portfolio of digital solutions for public and commercial sectors
transportRegistrationSystemDesc: A full-cycle digital system for registering cars and motorcycles — from application submission and document verification to issuing license plates and registration certificates.
transportRegistrationSystemTask: Create a unified digital platform for vehicle registration
transportRegistrationSystemSolution: An integrated system with automatic data verification
systemEDODesc: An integrated system for managing citizen flows and processing applications within institutions.
systemEDOSolution: Electronic queue system with intelligent distribution
registerIDCardsDesc: An online system for applying for ID cards and passports with automatic identification and electronic queue.
registerIDCardsSolution: Platform with biometric identification and online booking
safeRoadDesc: An app for checking and paying traffic fines with automatic data retrieval from government systems and payment gateways.
safeRoadTask: Create a convenient fine payment service
safeRoadSolution: Mobile app integrated with government databases
recognitionSystemDesc: Technologies for intelligent data processing and automatic document verification.
recognitionSystemSolution: AI-based recognition and validation system with 99.2% accuracy
analyticsSystemDesc: Intelligent tools for analyzing application flows, transactions, and public services.
analyticsSystemTask: Create an analytics center for public services
analyticsSystemSolution: BI platform with predictive analytics and visualization
cashRegisterSystemDesc: A hardware-software module for accepting public and commercial payments at offices and mobile service points.
cashRegisterSystemSolution: Universal cash system supporting all payment types
serviceSystemDesc: A mobile solution enabling staff to process documents and accept payments on-site.
serviceSystemSolution: Tablet app with offline mode and synchronization
digitalServiceSystemDesc: Comprehensive digitalization of public service centers including queue management, document flow, payments, and process control.
digitalServiceSystemSolution: Comprehensive platform for managing all center processes
